query: SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total, MIN(CAST(roundNumber AS UNSIGNED)) as min_round, MAX(CAST(roundNumber AS UNSIGNED)) as max_round FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 30001 GROUP BY phase ORDER BY total DESC;
